## Summary

Build a **Soroban event indexer** that subscribes to `score_updated` contract events (#25) and syncs attestation state to the ZCore database — enabling the dapp and lenders to query off-chain without simulating every read.

---

## Background

`set_score` emits `ScoreUpdated` events on-chain. Today consumers must:
- Poll `get_score` via RPC simulation (slow, rate-limited)
- Or call ZCore API attestation endpoint (centralized)

An indexer bridges on-chain attestations to `User` records or a new `OnChainAttestation` table for fast reads and analytics.

---

## Proposed architecture

```
Soroban RPC getEvents (cron every 5 min)
        ↓
Server/src/jobs/soroban-indexer.job.ts
        ↓
Upsert OnChainAttestation { wallet, score, tier, txHash, updatedAt, validUntil }
        ↓
GET /api/user/{wallet}/on-chain reads DB first, falls back to RPC
```

**Prisma model (new):**
```prisma
model OnChainAttestation {
  walletAddress String   @id
  score         Int
  tierCode      Int
  txHash        String?
  updatedAt     DateTime
  validUntil    DateTime?
  indexedAt     DateTime @default(now())
}
```

**Trigger:** Vercel Cron (`vercel.json` crons) or external scheduler

**Env:** `SCORE_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_ID`, `SOROBAN_RPC_URL`, `INDEXER_CURSOR` (last indexed ledger)

---

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Indexer processes `score_updated` events from testnet contract
- [ ] `GET /on-chain` prefers indexed data when fresh (<10 min)
- [ ] Cursor persisted to avoid re-processing
- [ ] Idempotent upsert on duplicate events
- [ ] Manual run script: `npm run indexer:once --prefix Server`
- [ ] Document in `Contracts/README.md`

---

## Related

- #25 score_updated events (closed)
- #16 testnet contract deployment
- #24 freshness fields

---

## Out of scope

- Real-time websocket streaming
- Multi-contract indexing
